whyMatters: Esta noticia representa un desarrollo relevante en su sector.
fullArticle:
Famitsu has published its estimated physical game software data for Japan for the week of June 29, 2026 to July 5, 2026.

Rhythm Heaven Groove for Switch was the highest selling new release of the week, opening at 60,428 retail copies sold.

On the hardware side, Switch 2 sold 32,797 units, the PlayStation 5 family sold 10,913 units, the Switch family sold 10,788 units, and the Xbox Series family sold 730 units.

Software Sales (followed by lifetime sales)

Rankings 11 to 30 will be announced on July 10.
